data.title: Why Is Solana Rising Overnight On Thursday?
data.description: Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) sustained its upward momentum Thursday overnight, as cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ:COIN) scaled up its infrastructure to support faster, smoother SOL transactions.

data.title: Netflix Confident Of Its 'Incredible Entertainment Value' As Recession Fears Intensify, Greg Peters Says $7.99 Ad Plan Engagement Remains 'Strong And Healthy'
data.description: Netflix Co-CEO Greg Peters reassured investors that the company's low-cost $7.99 ad plan remains resilient despite economic uncertainty and market volatility caused by President Trump's tariffs, with no significant changes in consumer behavior.

data.title: 80% Of Americans Say The Country Would Be Better Off With More Manufacturing Jobs—But Only 25% Want One Themselves
Why Arthur Hayes Sees Ethereum Outperforming Solana In The Next Market Impulse
Cathie Wood's Pours Another $4.95 Million Into Solana Staking ETF, Dumps Bitcoin ETF Again
data.description: On Thursday, Cathie Wood-led Ark Invest made significant trades, most notably offloading ARK 21Shares Bitcoin ETF (BATS:ARKB) and pouring funds into the newly listed 3iQ Solana Staking ETF (SOLQ.U).
